monlib.description: Shared library: mirrors any program's display onto attached monitor peripherals and normalizes mouse/monitor-touch input
monlib.author: hez1ch

threed.description: Shared library: real 3D math (vectors, rotation matrices, sphere sampling, projection, Lambert shading) for terminal/monitor renders
threed.author: hez1ch

minegram.description: Minegram client - Telegram-like chat for CC:Tweaked players
minegram.author: hez1ch

minegram-server.description: Minegram server - hosts chats/groups/channels for Minegram clients, with a live monitor dashboard
minegram-server.author: hez1ch

lastfm.description: Pretty now-playing viewer powered by the Last.fm API
lastfm.author: hez1ch

krnl-upd.description: Pick which OS build (3ggrnel / SmallVanya / Hezion) fastfetch reports
krnl-upd.author: hez1ch

fastfetch.description: neofetch-style system info screen (OS, package manager, uptime, disk)
fastfetch.author: hez1ch

moonsat.description: Screensaver: a REAL 3D spinning moon (rotation matrices + Lambert lighting) orbited by a radio satellite
moonsat.author: hez1ch

satellites.description: A REAL 3D spinning Earth with tracked satellites in real-time orbit (moves once per real minute); click/tap a satellite for full info
satellites.author: hez1ch

satellites-admin.description: Add/edit/remove the satellites shown by the `satellites` viewer, and manage which computers are linked to each one
satellites-admin.author: hez1ch
